text.message: I was going to take your offer then orange made his and I figured you may try to snake me
Well, I was worried you wouldnt
since you become extremely strong with that port
Why put the question up if you deny everything
Blue orange had ore too. And had more points why not try from him
higher chance to get the ore
Interesting perspective he's ahead and had more cards yet stole from me
yes, but i wanted the ore
Nah you’re still a dirt bag
straight up lied about the nb
worse than any lie I told
Do it I’ll solo you too
dude wants to solo me because I took his port?
then he lies about nb, i try to make truce, he continues to get mad
4 knights two down devs  most points
I feel like im not actually ahead
no knight for white or orange either
You are already so far ahead what does it matter
I also dont think im "so far ahead"
so at what point do I stop being the only one getting robbed
